texto: I've never felt a connection like this with anyone else... I don't even know how to explain it. I feel like I already knew you before I met you, and the first time I saw you, the first time I talked to you, was incidental, because the connection was already there --.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a M. Molly Backes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I've never felt a connection like this with anyone else... I don't even know how to explain it. I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, connection, already pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
